metadata.description: Sulis AI plugin marketplace — methodology studios, requirements analysis, facilitation, context cartography, right-sized architecture, disciplined change primitives, deterministic code intelligence, founder coordination, and now autonomous Work Package execution end-to-end. v1.12.0 ships two major additions and the standards underpinning them: (1) sulis-execution v0.5 — the WP Executor + Orchestrator covering the full 10-step atomic lifecycle (worktree → Red-Green-Blue → lint → commit → push → CI poll → direct squash-merge to dev (no PR per GIT-05) → Sulis SDK deploy → health-check → smoke-test → mark done) across all 22 change primitives (EXPAND / REORGANISE / SUBSTITUTE / CONTRACT / REINFORCE), with OODA + Five Whys self-healing per executor-loop-standard.md and bounded retry budgets. (2) sulis-concierge v0.1.3 — Phase 5 (Implement) now spawns the orchestrator via Agent tool rather than recommending a slash command, closing the coordination-execution gap. Plus two new marketplace-wide standards: git-workflow-standard.md (GIT-01..GIT-10 — two-branch dev/main model, Conventional Commits, direct merge to dev on CI green with no PR ceremony, dev→main promotion ceremony, SemVer release tags) and executor-loop-standard.md (EL-01..EL-08 — OODA loop on every fallible step, verbatim failure observation, Five Whys diagnosis bounded at 5, minimum-change Decide, scope guard, per-failure-type self-heal budget, structured BLOCKER record format). Per the v1.11.3 lesson, all modified plugins get version bumps so the reload's delta detection fires.

plugins.name: srd
plugins.description: Requirements Analyst — facilitates building Software Requirements Documents backed by UML artifacts through guided conversation. Includes intent triage (Phase 1), disambiguation sweep (Phase 3.5), and adversarial sweep (Phase 3.6 — produces MISUSE_CASES.md with negative requirements). Reads .context/{project}/INDEX.md (from sulis-context) on Phase 1 to apply Respect-Don't-Restate. Hands architecture work over to SEA via early or mid-session handover. v1.17.0 adds the marketplace-wide executor-loop-standard.md (EL-01..EL-08) — OODA loop on every fallible step, verbatim failure observation, Five Whys diagnosis (bounded at 5), minimum-change Decide, scope guard for out-of-scope failures, per-failure-type self-heal budget, structured BLOCKER record format. Composes with git-workflow-standard.md (v1.16.2) and CP/AAF/EP. Used by every autonomous-execution agent in the marketplace (sulis-execution, etc).

plugins.name: sulis-context
plugins.description: Context Cartographer — discovers existing architecture documentation, ADRs, conventions, and standards in a project; produces .context/{project}/INDEX.md so downstream plugins (SRD, SEA, sulis-security) respect prior decisions instead of restating them. Folder-structure-agnostic; works on any project shape.

plugins.name: sulis-strategy
plugins.description: Business strategy studio — vision, strategy, principles, commercial, GTM, roadmap, and domain-specific research

plugins.name: sulis-product-development
plugins.description: Product development studio — design, plan, implement, complete, feature lifecycle, validation, and autonomous sub-agents

plugins.name: sulis-builder
plugins.description: Studio builder — create new domain expertise packages (7-file studio bundles) using the studio-creation sequence

plugins.name: sulis-design
plugins.description: Design studio — design language, tokens, visual identity, customer experience, and cross-outcome coherence verification

plugins.name: sulis-platform-sdk
plugins.description: Platform SDK — build production-ready SaaS backends with built-in auth, billing, multi-tenancy, and observability

plugins.name: sea
plugins.description: Senior Engineering Architect — designs hardened architectures, audits brownfield code for primitive gaps, and decomposes designs into atomic Work Packages with Red-Green-Blue verification. /sea:probe v0.9.0 runs 17 deterministic phases via ast-grep + lizard + scc + git plus optional tools (jscpd, ts-prune, vulture, deadcode, dependency-cruiser, import-linter, detect-secrets). Polyglot 4-stage workspace enumeration discovers TS, Python, Go, Rust, Terraform, and deployment-only dirs alongside monorepo manifests. Phase 1.16 (Deployment Topology) catalogues Dockerfiles, K8s manifests, Helm charts, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Argo CD, Flux, and Sulis manifests (Workload/Application/BusinessManifest) with secret-reference extraction (NAMES only). Phase 1.17 (Credential Scanning) invokes detect-secrets with a strict hash-only privacy contract — plaintext never appears in any output — and respects .secrets.baseline for new-vs-known triage. Outputs structured JSON + Markdown + self-contained navigable HTML. Tools auto-install via the bundled installer; no LLM fallback. Every WP carries a change primitive (22-primitive Minto-pyramid catalogue). Enforces No-Band-Aid-Wrappers (MUST). Reads .context/{project}/INDEX.md (sulis-context); computes SIZING.md (sFPC + ASR). Consumes SRD v1.11.0+ MISUSE_CASES.md, GLOSSARY.md, ## Deferred to SEA journal sections, and HANDOFF_TO_SEA.md.

plugins.name: sulis-security
plugins.description: Security & Viability Reviewer — runs a 25-primitive codebase viability assessment (security, data protection, code quality, supply chain, infrastructure) via an OODA-spiral methodology. Composes with SEA for hardening and SRD for requirements-traceable findings.

plugins.name: idc
plugins.description: Investor Deck Coach — facilitates Sequoia-style pitch deck creation through guided one-question-at-a-time conversation. Stage-aware (angel, pre-seed, seed, Series A, Series B). Produces evidence-backed market research with tiered sources, stage-appropriate financial modelling (Excel + branded HTML dashboard), adversarial investor-objection review, customer-branded PowerPoint + HTML decks (Reveal.js), and a live rehearsal drill.

plugins.name: sulis-execution
plugins.description: Work Package Executor + Orchestrator. v0.6.0 expands the lifecycle from 10 to 12 steps based on first-live-run learnings: (a) new Step 5 (Documentation update) — keeps docs in sync with the behaviour change; auto-detects affected docs from the WP's modified files OR reads explicit `docs_to_update` frontmatter list; no-op if nothing applies. (b) new Step 11 (Post-deploy verification) — always-on default during calibration; spawns sulis-security:security-reviewer with merge SHA + staging URL for static code analysis + passive deployed-surface checks (HTTP headers, TLS, file exposure); CRITICAL findings halt + BLOCKER; CONCERN/ADVISORY log to acceptance evidence; opt-out per WP via `post_deploy_verification: none` for docs-only WPs. (c) Steps 9 (health) and 10 (smoke) collapsed into one Step 10 (Health-check + Smoke-test) for narrative clarity. v0.5.1 prior: Continuation Discipline, explicit agent spawning in skills, auto-deploy detection, resume-from-journal logic. Active probes (OWASP ZAP / Nuclei / SQLi) explicitly out of scope per sulis-security boundaries. Pairs with sulis-concierge v0.1.3+ and sea v0.11.2+ (WP template provides the new frontmatter fields).

plugins.name: sulis-concierge
plugins.description: Founder Concierge — the **VP of Engineering** for non-technical founders building a product through the Sulis AI marketplace. Owns the 7-phase journey (Greet → Discover → Specify → Design → Implement → Verify → Secure), directs specialist agents (SRD, SEA, sulis-context, sulis-execution, sulis-security), reads their produced artifacts, translates output into plain English. The founder owns *what* the product is (users, business model, brand, risk); the concierge owns *how* it gets built (sequencing, conventions, artifacts, structure). v0.1.3 closes the implementation-execution gap: Phase 5 (Implement) now **spawns the sulis-execution orchestrator via Agent tool** rather than recommending a slash command. The orchestrator walks the WP INDEX autonomously, the concierge translates progress + blockers to plain English on demand. Phase 3 (Specify) and Phase 4 (Design) keep the recommend pattern (they're founder-interactive). v0.1.2 added Decision Discipline; v0.1.1 added Brevity Discipline. Composes with AAF-01..AAF-09 and CP-01..CP-05. Journey state persists in `.concierge/{project}/JOURNEY.md`.
